title: How to Teach Loose-Leash Walking | Karen Pryor Clicker Training
raw_text: Karen Pryor Clicker Training guide for loose leash walking (updated Aug 2025). Ken Ramirez methodology. Marker-based training: click the moment leash goes loose. Step 1: build check-in behavior - reward eye contact voluntarily offered. Step 2: reward forward movement with loose leash. Step 3: introduce directional changes to maintain attention. Step 4: proof on walks with increasing distractions. Click-treat timing critical - within 1-2 seconds of loose leash. Founded 2001, world-renowned positive reinforcement methodology.

metadata.query: leash pulling loose leash training evidence based
metadata.notes: Karen Pryor Clicker Training - world-renowned R+ pioneer, KPCT certified methodology
